originalTitle: Dhamaal 4 (Trailer): Ajay Devgn, Arshad W, Riteish D, Jaaved J| Indra K| Bhushan K, Ashok T| 10 July
content: Theek saamne, aapko woh play button dikh raha hai? Haan, usse daba dijiye ▶️🚨 Presenting the Official Trailer of “Dhamaal 4” directed by Indra Kumar starring Ajay Devgn, Arshad Warsi, Riteish Deshmukh, Jaaved Jaaferi, Ravi Kishan, Sanjay Mishra, Upendra Limaye, Anjali Anand, Sanjeeda Shaikh & Esha Gupta. Watch the biggest family entertainer #Dhamaal4 in cinemas worldwide from 10th July! Gulshan Kumar & T-Series Present In Association With Devgn Films A T-Series Films, Maruti International, Panorama Studios Production "DHAMAAL 4" Join the madness of Dhamaal 4 and get ready for a laughter riot like never before. Hit ‘I’m Interested’ now for exclusive offers, updates, & more only on BookMyShow. chineseContent: Theek saamne、aapko woh 玩按钮 dikh raha hai？ Haan，usse daba dijiye ▶️🚨 推出由 Indra Kumar 执导的《Dhamaal 4》官方预告片，主演包括 Ajay Devgn、Arshad Warsi、Riteish Deshmukh、Jaaved Jaaferi、Ravi Kishan、Sanjay Mishra、Upendra Limaye、Anjali Anand、Sanjeeda Shaikh 和 Esha Gupta。从 7 月 10 日起，在全球电影院观看最大的家庭艺人#Dhamaal4！ Gulshan Kumar 和 T-Series 与 Devgn Films 联合出席 A T-Series Films、Maruti International、Panorama Studios 制作的“DHAMAAL 4” 加入 Dhamaal 4 的疯狂，准备迎接一场前所未有的欢笑骚乱。立即点击“我感兴趣”，即可获得 BookMyShow 独家优惠、更新及更多信息。链接：https://bookmy.show/D4HI 导演：Indra Kumar 制片人：Ajay Devgn 制片人：Bhushan Kumar、Krishan Kumar 制片人：Ashok Thakeria、Indra Kumar、Anand Pandit、Kumar Mangat Pathak 联合制片人：Shiv Chanana 总裁（T 系列）：Neeraj Kalyan 联合制片人（Maruti International）：Yash Shah 编剧： Paritosh Painter、Balvinder Singh Suri、Vedd Prakash、Bunty Rathore 对话：Bunty Rathore 摄影指导：Sudhir Kumar Chaudhary 编辑：Sanjay Sankla 副制片人（Maruti International）：Dilip Mistry 副制片人（Panorama Studios）：Sanjeev Joshi 工作室负责人（Devgn Films）：Danish Devgn 音乐：Tanishk Bagchi、Aditya Dev、 Neelkamal Singh、Sanju Rathod、Guru Randhawa、Gill Machrai、Rony Ajnali 作词：Kumaar、Guru Randhawa、Gill Machrai、Rony Ajnali、Sanju Rathod、Dheeraj Babuaan 背景配乐：Amar Mohile 声音设计师：Pradeep Suri 动作导演：R P Yadav 制作设计师：Swapnil Bhalerao 和 Madhur Madhavan 副导演： Amit Singh Rajput 执行制片人：Pitamber Kharal (Ganesh) 制片人：Mayur Pithwa 单元制作人
